_comment: Per-repository descriptions for external contributions. Keyed by lowercased 'owner/repo'. Consumed by cmd/harvester generate-contributions-json.

descriptions.apache/arrow-rs: Rust-side work in the Arrow ecosystem around columnar data and query plumbing.
descriptions.apache/datafusion: Query engine fixes and improvements in the Arrow-native SQL execution stack.
descriptions.apache/fluss-rust: Client and integration work in the Fluss streaming ecosystem.
descriptions.apache/iceberg-rust: Rust contributions around Apache Iceberg tables, metadata, and interoperability.
descriptions.beelzebub-labs/beelzebub: Infrastructure-facing fixes and implementation work in a production-oriented platform project.
descriptions.cortexflow/cortexbrain: Implementation work across infrastructure and automation-oriented platform tooling.
descriptions.datapizza-labs/datapizza-ai: Applied AI engineering work across product integrations and developer-facing features.
descriptions.informagico/fantavibe: Targeted upstream fixes and improvements in a smaller community project.
descriptions.italia-opensource/awesome-italia-opensou: Curation and contribution work supporting the Italian open source ecosystem.
descriptions.lakekeeper/lakekeeper: Lakehouse catalog and metadata contributions around operational reliability.
descriptions.lance-format/lance: Columnar storage and vector-data work in the Lance ecosystem.
descriptions.mosaico-labs/mosaico: Contributions across AI workflow orchestration and open tooling.
descriptions.pganalyze/pg_query.rs: Rust and Postgres parsing work in a low-level developer tooling library.
descriptions.piopy/fantacalcio-py: Small but concrete fixes in a Python project with an active user base.
descriptions.pola-rs/polars: Rust-native analytics work across DataFrame performance, ergonomics, and engine behavior.
descriptions.risingwavelabs/risingwave: Streaming database contributions across query behavior, engine details, and developer workflow.
descriptions.rust-ita/rust-docs-it: Community translation and upkeep work for Italian Rust documentation.
descriptions.supabase/etl: Data ingestion and transformation contributions in a production-facing ETL stack.
descriptions.tokio-rs/axum: Web framework contributions around routing, ergonomics, and service integration in Rust.
descriptions.tokio-rs/tokio: Async runtime improvements around Rust concurrency, scheduling, and developer ergonomics.
descriptions.vakamo-labs/openfga-client: Client-library fixes and interface improvements around authorization tooling.
